final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};


    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            memory <= data_in; // Write operation
        end
        data_out <= memory; // Read operation
    end

endmodule
